title: Set 3: The Science Project 🔬

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: Hi William, have you started your science project yet?

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: Why did you decide to write about the moon?

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: Where did you find all those beautiful pictures for your poster?

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: How long does our presentation need to be?

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: I’m worried that I might forget what to say in front of the class.

conversation.speaker: Emma
conversation.text: Can I see your poster when it's finished?

options.text: Don't worry, we can practice together later.
About five minutes, so we don't need much text.
I used my new computer to print them.
Because I’ve always been interested in space.
It’s on the teacher’s desk in the classroom.
On a website that my brother told me about.
Not yet, but I’m going to the library now.
Of course, I’ll bring it to school tomorrow.

explanations_vi: Emma hỏi tại sao chọn chủ đề mặt trăng (Why), William đáp vì luôn có hứng thú với không gian vũ trụ (Because I’ve always been interested in space).
Emma hỏi tìm các bức ảnh ở đâu (Where), William đáp là trên một trang web mà anh trai giới thiệu (On a website...).
Emma hỏi bài thuyết trình kéo dài bao lâu (How long), William đáp khoảng 5 phút (About five minutes).
Emma bày tỏ lo lắng sẽ quên bài thuyết trình, William an ủi (Don't worry) và hẹn cùng thực hành sau.
Emma xin xem tấm áp phích khi làm xong (Can I see), William đồng ý (Of course) và hứa ngày mai sẽ mang đến trường.
